title: Company Graph Entity Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for all six entity types in the Vibrana Company Graph v2

Actor.title: Actor
Actor.description: A person or team who participates in workflows, makes decisions, and owns value objects

id.description: Unique identifier for the actor, format: actor-NNN

name.description: Full name of the person or name of the team

job_family.description: Functional area or department the actor belongs to

tools_used.description: List of tools and systems this actor regularly uses

current_workflows.description: IDs of workflows this actor participates in

reports_to.description: Actor ID of this person's manager, or null for top-level

joined_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this person joined the company

notes.description: Additional context about this actor's role, history, or notable attributes

Workflow.title: Workflow
Workflow.description: A repeatable business process — the unit of operational work

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow, format: wf-NNN

owner.description: Actor ID of the person who owns and is accountable for this workflow

trigger.description: What initiates this workflow — event, schedule, or condition

output.description: The primary deliverable or outcome of this workflow

steps.description: Ordered list of steps in the workflow

tools_used.description: Tools and systems used in this workflow

avg_time_hours.description: Average time in hours to complete one instance of this workflow

pain_points.description: Known friction points, inefficiencies, or failure modes

ai_readiness_score.description: Score 1–10: how ready this workflow is for AI augmentation (1=not ready, 10=highly ready)

ai_candidate.description: Whether this workflow is a near-term candidate for AI augmentation

ai_opportunity_summary.description: Description of the AI opportunity, blockers, and expected ROI

Decision.title: Decision
Decision.description: A significant, durable choice made by the organization — captured with full rationale and dissent

id.description: Unique identifier for the decision, format: dec-NNN

title.description: Short, descriptive title for the decision

made_by.description: Actor IDs of the primary decision-makers

made_at.description: ISO 8601 date the decision was made

context.description: Background and context that prompted this decision

alternatives_considered.description: Alternatives that were considered and why they were rejected

outcome.description: What actually happened as a result of this decision

rationale.description: The full reasoning behind the decision

dissenting_views.description: Documented dissenting views at the time of the decision

still_valid.description: Whether the rationale for this decision is still considered valid today

affects_workflows.description: Workflow IDs that this decision directly affects

Commitment.title: Commitment
Commitment.description: An explicit promise made between parties — customer, internal, or vendor

id.description: Unique identifier for the commitment, format: com-NNN

made_by.description: Actor ID of the person who made the commitment

made_to.description: ID of the recipient — can be an actor-NNN or vo-NNN (for customer commitments)

description.description: Full description of what was promised, to whom, and in what context

due_date.description: ISO 8601 date the commitment is/was due

evidence_source.description: Where this commitment is documented (email, Slack, contract, meeting notes)

related_workflow.description: The workflow most directly associated with delivering this commitment

notes.description: Additional context, blockers, or updates on this commitment

ValueObject.title: ValueObject
ValueObject.description: A product, customer, data asset, knowledge asset, or capital resource — something the company creates, owns, or is accountable for

id.description: Unique identifier for the value object, format: vo-NNN

description.description: What this value object is and why it matters

owner.description: Actor ID of the person accountable for this value object

business_value.description: Qualitative or quantitative description of the business value this object represents

connected_workflows.description: Workflow IDs that create, use, or maintain this value object

health_status.description: Current health or status of this value object

metadata.description: Flexible key-value metadata specific to this value object type

Relationship.title: Relationship
Relationship.description: An explicit edge between two entities in the graph

id.description: Unique identifier for the relationship, format: rel-NNN

from_id.description: The source entity ID (actor-NNN, wf-NNN, dec-NNN, com-NNN, or vo-NNN)

to_id.description: The target entity ID (actor-NNN, wf-NNN, dec-NNN, com-NNN, or vo-NNN)

relationship_type.description: The type of relationship between the two entities

description.description: Human-readable explanation of this specific relationship

strength.description: How strong or direct this relationship is

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date when this relationship was first established
